Title: Verify user login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the valid email and password
3. Click the login button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in

Title: Verify user logout
Test Steps:
1. Click the logout button
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the login page
Expected Result: User is successfully logged out

Title: Verify faculty can add a user
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the faculty dashboard
2. Click the "Add User" button
3. Enter the user's details
4. Click the "Save" button
Expected Result: User is successfully added to the faculty

Title: Verify faculty can remove a user
Preconditions: Faculty is logged in and a user exists in the system
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the faculty dashboard
2. Find the user to be removed
3. Click the "Remove" button next to the user
4. Verify that the user is removed from the faculty list
Expected Result: User is successfully removed from the faculty

Title: Verify user camp can add a user
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user camp dashboard
2. Click the "Add User" button
3. Enter the user's details
4. Click the "Save" button
Expected Result: User is successfully added to the user camp

Title: Verify user camp can remove a user
Preconditions: UserCamp is logged in and a user exists in the system
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user camp dashboard
2. Find the user to be removed
3. Click the "Remove" button next to the user
4. Verify that the user is removed from the user camp list
Expected Result: User is successfully removed from the user camp

Title: Verify user can access the home page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the home page
Expected Result: User is successfully redirected to the home page

Title: Verify user can access the monitoring section
Test Steps:
1. Access the menu at the bottom
2. Click the "Monitoring" option
Expected Result: User is successfully redirected to the monitoring section

Title: Verify user can view notes
Preconditions: User is logged in and notes exist
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the monitoring section
2. Verify that the notes are displayed
Expected Result: User can view the notes

Title: Verify user can add a note
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the monitoring section
2. Click the "Add Note" button
3. Enter the note content
4. Click the "Save" button
Expected Result: Note is successfully added

Title: Verify user can log in to the family activity application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the valid email and password
3. Click the login button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home activity

Title: Verify family activity can be created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the family activity creation page
2. Enter the family activity details
3. Click the "Create" button
Expected Result: Family activity is successfully created

Title: Verify user can navigate to the profile activity

Title: Verify user can view their profile
